title: PwDs Accessing Help & Resources - Functional Test Plan (33 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-287: PwDs Accessing Help & Resources. Validates navigation to Help & Resources page, landing page layout (title, subtitle, search, tabs), search functionality, Help Topics categories with article cards, article detail page content, FAQ accordion behavior, Contact Us section (email, phone, regional support), and responsive layout.

categories.name: Getting Started
categories.description: Essential guides to help you begin your journey with assistive devices

categories.name: Device Search
categories.description: Learn how to find the perfect assistive device for your needs

categories.name: Accessibility Support
categories.description: Platform accessibility features and assistance resources

faqQuestions: How can I see device reviews?
How do I purchase a device?
Can I save devices to view later?
How does the Device Matcher work?
How do I find devices suitable for my disability type?

testCases.title: Help & Resources link is visible in top navigation bar
steps: Verify Help & Resources link is visible in nav.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the homepage.
expectedResults: Help & Resources link is visible in top navigation.

testCases.title: Clicking Help & Resources navigates to help-center page
testCases.preconditions: User is on the homepage.
expectedResults: Clicking Help & Resources navigates to /help-center.

testCases.title: Help & Resources nav link is visually highlighted as active on help page
steps: Check Help & Resources link for active/current class.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Help & Resources link has active/current class.

testCases.title: Help page loads within acceptable time
steps: Measure navigation time to help-center page.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the homepage.
expectedResults: Help page loads within 5 seconds.

testCases.title: Page displays H1 title Help & Resources
steps: Verify H1 text is Help & Resources.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: H1 title 'Help & Resources' is displayed.

testCases.title: Page displays descriptive subtitle below title
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Descriptive subtitle is visible below title.

testCases.title: Search input is visible with correct placeholder
steps: Verify search input is visible with placeholder text.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Search input is visible with placeholder text.

testCases.title: Three tabs are present: Help Topics, FAQ, Contact Us
steps: Verify all three tab buttons are visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Help Topics, FAQ, and Contact Us tabs are visible.

testCases.title: Only one tab is active at a time
steps: Click each tab and verify only one has active state.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Only one tab has active state at a time.

testCases.title: Search input accepts text input
steps: Verify input value matches typed text.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Search input accepts text.

testCases.title: Typing a keyword updates visible results
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Typing a keyword updates visible results.

testCases.title: Searching for non-existent term shows no results message
steps: Type a non-existent term into search.
Verify no results or empty state is shown.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Non-existent term shows no results message.

testCases.title: Clearing search restores original content
testCases.preconditions: User searched for a term.
expectedResults: Clearing search restores original content.

testCases.title: Help Topics tab displays category cards
steps: Verify Help Topics tab is active by default.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Help Topics tab displays category cards.

testCases.title: Each category card shows title, description, and article count
steps: Verify each category has h3 title, description text, and article count.
testCases.preconditions: Help Topics tab is active.
expectedResults: Each category shows title, description, and article count.

testCases.title: Clicking View articles reveals article list within category
steps: Click View articles toggle on first category.
testCases.preconditions: Help Topics tab is active.
expectedResults: Clicking View articles reveals article list.

testCases.title: Article cards display title and description
steps: Verify article cards have heading and description.
testCases.preconditions: Category articles are expanded.
expectedResults: Article cards have heading and description.

testCases.title: Clicking an article card navigates to article detail page
testCases.preconditions: Help Topics tab is active.
expectedResults: Clicking article card navigates to /help-article/.

testCases.title: Article page displays H1 title
steps: Verify H1 is visible with article title.
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: H1 title is visible with article title.

testCases.title: Article page shows read time and last updated date
steps: Verify read time and updated date are visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: Read time and last updated date are visible.

testCases.title: Article page has Back to Help Center link that navigates back
steps: Verify Back to Help Center link is visible.
Click it and verify navigation to help-center.
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: Back to Help Center link navigates back.

testCases.title: Article page has step-by-step content with headings
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: Step-by-step content with h3 headings is present.

testCases.title: Article page has Was this article helpful prompt with Yes/No options
steps: Verify helpful prompt text and Yes/No buttons are visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: 'Was this article helpful' prompt with Yes/No is visible.

testCases.title: FAQ tab displays Frequently Asked Questions heading
steps: Verify Frequently Asked Questions heading is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: FAQ tab displays 'Frequently Asked Questions' heading.

testCases.title: FAQ items are displayed in accordion format
steps: Verify FAQ items use details/summary elements.
Verify at least 6 FAQ items are present.
testCases.preconditions: FAQ tab is active.
expectedResults: FAQ items are in accordion format with at least 6 items.

testCases.title: Clicking a FAQ expands it to show the answer
testCases.preconditions: FAQ tab is active.
expectedResults: Clicking a FAQ expands it to show the answer.

testCases.title: Expanding one FAQ collapses the previously expanded one
testCases.preconditions: FAQ tab is active.
expectedResults: Expanding one FAQ collapses the previously expanded one.

testCases.title: Contact Us tab displays Email Support with email address and Send Email action
steps: Verify Email Support heading, email address, response time, and Send Email link are visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on the help-center page.
expectedResults: Contact Us tab shows Email Support with email and Send Email action.

testCases.title: Contact Us tab displays Phone Support with number and Call Now action
steps: Verify Phone Support heading, phone number, hours, and Call Now link are visible.
testCases.preconditions: Contact Us tab is active.
expectedResults: Phone Support with number and Call Now action is visible.

testCases.title: Contact Us tab displays Regional Support Centers with locations and numbers
steps: Verify Regional Support Centers heading and at least 3 locations with phone numbers.
testCases.preconditions: Contact Us tab is active.
expectedResults: Regional Support Centers with locations and numbers are visible.

testCases.title: Help page is accessible on mobile viewport via hamburger menu
steps: Verify Help & Resources link is visible.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile (375x667).
expectedResults: Help page is accessible via hamburger menu on mobile.

testCases.title: Share this article section is visible on article detail page
steps: Verify Share this story heading is visible.
testCases.preconditions: User is on an article detail page.
expectedResults: 'Share this article' section is visible.

testCases.title: No horizontal overflow on mobile viewport
steps: Verify body scrollWidth does not exceed viewport.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: No horizontal overflow on mobile.
